suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the pattern of using React Router's Navigate component with 'replace' prop for route redirects when moving routes between role sections (e.g., admin to librarian).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend-route-restructuring feature used <Navigate to="/librarian/books-management" replace /> pattern for moved routes, preventing old routes from being added to browser history.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that redirect stubs for moved routes should be placed at the top level of Routes, outside any ProtectedRoute wrapper. This allows any user navigating to old paths to be redirected, then authenticated at the destination route.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: App.tsx redirect routes at lines 81-84 are outside ProtectedRoute, allowing seamless redirect before authentication check at destination.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Unused import 'AdminReports' at line 17 in App.tsx - dead code left behind when the route was removed.
